title: Zephyr lichen/subsys: CCP-16 Load Balancing TDMA adaptive SF multi-channel density-aware
description: Implement TDMA slot scheduling, adaptive SF based on SNR and density from DEFCON notes, multi-channel coordination in link/rpl layers. Use Kconfig flags. Parallel subagent with Rust/Python. After every logical chunk: run codereview 3x, file all findings as codereview beads. Do not close until 3 clean passes. Run tests, EC2 Zephyr builds (LICHEN tagged). Fix ALL before closing. Update lichen/subsys/lichen/* accordingly.
close_reason: Zephyr lichen/subsys TDMA scheduler, density-aware SF, multi-channel impl; all tests pass, converged
